hero.title: BATIKAN UZ
hero.subtitle: AI-Driven Creative & Growth Specialist
hero.descIntro: Tools used: Veo 3 (Fast), Runway Gen-4 Turbo, Nanobanana Pro, Adobe, Capcut
hero.descMusic1: Music clip video produced for the song 'Saftım' by the artist 6UZ. Tools used: Veo 3 (Fast), Runway Gen-4 Turbo, Nanobanana Pro, Adobe, Capcut
hero.descMusic2: Music clip video produced for the song 'Özürler Olsun' by the artist 6UZ. Tools used: Veo 3.1, Runway Aleph, Runway Gen-4 Turbo, Nanobanana 2, Adobe, Capcut
hero.descAppPromo: Promotional video prepared for Realtogen AI. Tools used: Elevenlabs, Runway Gen-4 Turbo, Renderforest, Adobe, Capcut
hero.descMain: Crafting digital experiences at the intersection of Design, AI, and Growth.

experience.introDesc: AI-driven creative and growth specialist with 6+ years in graphic design and 3 years in video editing, focused on generative AI, performance marketing, and scalable digital production.

zenoz.desc:
Conduct market and competitor analysis to identify positioning opportunities and high-potential target segments. Develop advertising concepts and AI-assisted creative assets aligned with brand strategy and audience insights.

Plan, launch, and manage paid advertising campaigns across digital platforms, overseeing a $8K–$10K monthly budget. Continuously monitor performance metrics, adjust targeting and creatives, and optimize budget allocation to improve conversion rates and overall campaign profitability.

sanaldrone.desc:
Lead the development of AI-powered commercial advertising solutions, with a strong focus on real estate and property investment markets. Create high-converting, AI-generated video and visual campaigns aligned with emerging industry trends and investor behavior.

Develop innovative digital advertising concepts and scalable creative systems tailored to real estate developers, construction firms, and investment projects. Pioneer trend-driven promotional formats that increase project visibility, attract qualified leads, and strengthen brand positioning in competitive property markets.

Oversee the full creative production pipeline — from concept development and scripting to visual design and final delivery — while managing the creative team and ensuring consistent brand quality. Optimize high-budget performance campaigns and continuously refine digital products and service models to improve scalability, efficiency, and client results.

frost.desc:
Delivered graphic design and video editing services for brands operating in healthcare, construction, and real estate sectors. Designed social media creatives, corporate branding materials, promotional visuals, and campaign assets aligned with each brand’s positioning and target audience.

Edited promotional videos, advertisements, and short-form digital content optimized for social media performance. Collaborated with marketing teams to develop visual concepts, ensure brand consistency, and produce trend-aligned content that supported digital campaign objectives and audience engagement.

selected.desc:
• StudioBytes: Built and scaled a 900+ member digital community and developed multiple game projects.
• Simpl.: Designed and directed a minimal, simplicity-focused digital product concept from branding to advertising.
• Load Find App: Developed and led the full design, UI/UX, frontend, and advertising strategy for a logistics-focused startup.
• TorqueParfum: Created and developed a consumer car fragrance brand.
• AugustWear: Developed a tactical and outdoor fashion e-commerce concept.
• AI Influencer Project: Created an AI-generated virtual influencer, reaching 20,000+ organic users.

certs.python: Python Programming from Zero to Advanced
